name: SharedTaskScheduler — Explorer COM Extension
categoryDescription: Registry keys that cause code to execute at boot, logon, or via Windows subsystem hooks.
description: COM objects registered here are loaded by Explorer on startup via the SharedTaskScheduler extension point.
forensic_value: A classic persistence mechanism — any CLSID registered here executes within Explorer. Less commonly checked than Run keys. Look for CLSIDs pointing to DLLs outside System32.
